goal: Handle multiple tasks in one call — reschedule + physical therapy

transcript.speaker: AGENT
transcript.text: This call may be recorded for quality and training purposes.

transcript.speaker: PATIENT
transcript.text: Hi, I'm calling with two things to take care of — I need to reschedule a follow-up appointment, and I have a question about physical therapy. Can you help me with both?

transcript.speaker: AGENT
transcript.text: Thanks for calling PivotPoint Orthopedics. Part of Pretty Good AI. Am I speaking with Sarah?

transcript.speaker: PATIENT
transcript.text: No, this is Patricia Lee — date of birth October 12, 1964, and I'm a patient of Dr. Williams.

transcript.speaker: AGENT
transcript.text: Can you please provide your date of birth?

transcript.speaker: AGENT
transcript.text: Just to confirm, I have your name as Patricia Lee, and your date of birth

transcript.speaker: AGENT
transcript.text: Could you please spell your first and last name for me?

transcript.speaker: PATIENT
transcript.text: Sure, it's P-A-T-R-I-C-I-A, and Lee is L-E-E.

transcript.speaker: PATIENT
transcript.text: I'm sorry, it sounds like you may be having some trouble — can you hear me okay?

transcript.speaker: AGENT
transcript.text: I can't proceed further right now, but I'll make sure our clinics support team follows up with you. Please hold while I document your request. Connecting you to a representative. Please wait.

transcript.speaker: AGENT
transcript.text: Hello. You've reached the Pretty Good AI test line. Goodbye.

transcript.speaker: PATIENT
transcript.text: Oh — okay, it seems like I got disconnected from the actual office. I'll need to call Pivot Point Orthopaedics back directly to handle my two requests.
